title: NEXUS Agent Bill of Materials (AgBOM) v0.3
description: Real-time, hash-chained Agent Bill of Materials. Extends CycloneDX v1.6 and SPDX 2.3 with NEXUS-native cryptographic provenance. Every tool discovery, MCP server connection, and capability change produces a new signed version. Defined in NEXUS-A2A Specification v0.3 Part III.

agent_did.description: DID of the agent that owns this AgBOM.

agbom_version.description: Monotonic version counter. Increments on every component add or remove.

aim_digest.description: SHA-256 of the agent's AIM at AgBOM creation time. Links AgBOM to the static capability declaration.

updated_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent version.

components.description: Current active component inventory. Reflects the live tool surface.

versions.description: Hash-chained version history. Every entry is signed and linked to its predecessor.

chain_head_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the most recent version. The chain anchor for integrity verification.

unsigned_component_count.description: Count of components lacking a NEXUS-signed capability manifest. Non-zero = supply chain risk.

bom_ref.description: Unique reference within this AgBOM. Format: {type}:{name}:{version}.

type.description: Component category. mcp_server components are automatically tracked for supply chain risk scoring.

purl.description: Package URL (purl) per ECMA-376. Format: pkg:{type}/{name}@{version}. Used for CycloneDX compatibility.

nexus_signed.description: True if the component has a NEXUS NCA-issued capability manifest with verified capabilityDigest. False = unsigned supply chain component.

capability_digest.description: SHA-256 of the component capability manifest. Present only when nexus_signed=true.

mcp_server_url.description: MCP server endpoint URL. Present only for type=mcp_server.

parent_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous version. Null for version 1. Forms the hash chain.

version_hash.description: SHA-256(parent_hash + agent_did + version_number + components_digest). Chain integrity anchor.

components_digest.description: SHA-256 of the canonical JSON of the component list at this version.

change_type.description: Nature of the change that created this version.

changed_component.description: bom_ref of the component that was added or removed. Absent for initial.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over version_hash using agent's AIM signing key. Base64url encoded.
